items.title: Peter Thiel and other tech billionaires are publicly shielding their children from the products that made them rich
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire, Thai authorities say
items.dek: Firefighters were called to the scene just after midnight local time and discovered patrons fleeing through the flame-enveloped front door of the venue.
items.body: Firefighters were called to the scene just after midnight local time and discovered patrons fleeing through the flame-enveloped front door of the venue.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Anthony Zurcher: From Trump critic to ally, Lindsey Graham was a political survivor of the Maga era
items.dek: The senator's career was marked by a willingness to adapt to America's dramatically changing political climate, writes the BBC's North America correspondent.
items.body: The senator's career was marked by a willingness to adapt to America's dramatically changing political climate, writes the BBC's North America correspondent.
